---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for HELIX.
title: "[FEATURE] <Feature summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
(e.g., I'm frustrated when [...] occurs.)

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Technical Implementation (Optional)
Describe how you would implement this. Which modules in `PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md` would this affect?

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact
How will this feature improve HELIX for other users or contributors?
